Run a ten-cycle wide MTR report and compare loss and latency by hop, noting that an intermediate hop ignoring ICMP does not itself prove end-to-end loss.

SQLMap 自动化 SQL 注入验证参考，面向本地或明确授权的实验接口，覆盖请求重放、参数选择、后端指纹和限量只读枚举。

SQLMap reference for automated SQL-injection validation against local or explicitly authorized lab endpoints, covering request replay, parameter selection, backend fingerprinting, and bounded read-only enumeration.

name.zh: 本地 GET 参数基线

description.zh: 仅对本地实验接口的 id 参数执行低级别、低风险基线，并把会话与结果写入独立输出目录。
description.en: Run a low-level, low-risk baseline against only the id parameter of a localhost lab endpoint and store the session and results in a dedicated output directory.

description.zh: 从已脱敏的原始 HTTP 请求文件重放测试，只选择 id 参数并保留可复核的本地输出。
description.en: Replay a redacted raw HTTP request, select only the id parameter, and retain locally reviewable output.

name.zh: 本地 POST 参数基线

description.zh: 对本地实验登录接口的单一 POST 参数运行低风险基线，固定其余字段以便比较服务端日志。
description.en: Run a low-risk baseline against one POST parameter of a localhost login fixture while fixing all other fields for server-log comparison.

description.zh: 使用专用实验会话 Cookie 重放单参数测试；不得把生产 Cookie、令牌或用户数据写入命令历史。
description.en: Replay a single-parameter test with a dedicated lab-session cookie and never place production cookies, tokens, or user data in command history.

description.zh: 在发现候选注入点后只收集后端指纹，并用应用版本、数据库日志和测试夹具配置交叉确认。
description.en: Collect only the backend fingerprint after a candidate finding and confirm it against application versions, database logs, and fixture configuration.

description.zh: 仅在隔离实例列出当前账号可见的数据库名称，并与预期最小权限清单比较。
description.en: List database names visible to the current account only in an isolated instance and compare them with the expected least-privilege inventory.

description.zh: 在固定 lab 数据库内列出表名，不跨库扩展范围，并把结果与夹具 schema 对照。
description.en: List table names within the fixed lab database without expanding scope across databases and compare the result with the fixture schema.

description.zh: 只读取 lab.users 的列元数据，用于验证对象范围和数据库账号暴露面。
description.en: Read only column metadata for lab.users to validate object scope and the exposure of the database account.

description.zh: 只读取最多十条合成夹具记录并限定列，不接触真实凭据、个人数据或生产表。
description.en: Read at most ten synthetic fixture rows from explicitly selected columns without touching real credentials, personal data, or production tables.

description.zh: 把实验请求发送到本地审计代理，保存完整请求、响应和时间戳以便与服务端日志关联。
description.en: Route lab requests through a localhost audit proxy and retain complete requests, responses, and timestamps for server-log correlation.

description.zh: 将测试限制为布尔、报错、联合和时间型检测，明确排除堆叠查询等高副作用路径。
description.en: Restrict testing to boolean, error, union, and time-based techniques while explicitly excluding stacked-query and other higher-impact paths.

description.zh: 在基线证据不足时仅提高覆盖级别，保持最低风险、单线程和固定延迟，并先确认停止条件。
description.en: Increase coverage only after an inconclusive baseline while retaining minimum risk, one thread, a fixed delay, and predefined stop conditions.

SQL Literals and JavaScript String Escapes

Generate named, decimal, or hexadecimal character references for an HTML text context.

python3 -c "import html; chars='<>&\"'; print([(c, html.escape(c, quote=True), f'&#{ord(c)};', f'&#x{ord(c):x};') for c in chars])"

Generate Python Unicode escapes and inspect the UTF-8 byte representation of the same text.
在 Python 与 JavaScript 中将 Unicode 转义恢复为文本，并比较结果。

Unicode 规范化与非法 UTF-8 负对照
Unicode Normalization and Invalid UTF-8 Controls

# 非法过长 UTF-8 负对照（现代解码器必须拒绝）:
# %c0%af 曾被旧实现错误解释为 /
# %c0%ae 曾被旧实现错误解释为 .

Validate consistent handling of Unicode escapes and illegal overlong UTF-8; acceptance of overlong encodings by a modern implementation is the anomaly.

description.zh: 通过 LuaSocket 按行接收命令，用 io.popen 捕获标准输出与错误并写回同一 TCP 会话；连接关闭时显式退出。
description.en: Receive commands line by line through LuaSocket, capture standard output and error with io.popen, return them on the same TCP session, and exit explicitly when closed.

description.zh: 先向本机监听端发送固定标记，独立验证 LuaSocket 安装、地址族和网络可达性，再测试任何命令循环。
description.en: Send a fixed marker to a localhost listener first to validate LuaSocket installation, address handling, and reachability independently of any command loop.

patches.value: GNU Awk 双向 TCP 通道与 UDP 固定标记参考，依赖 gawk 的 /inet 特殊文件和 |& 协进程语义，不适用于所有 POSIX awk 实现。
GNU Awk reference for a bidirectional TCP channel and UDP fixed-marker transport, requiring gawk /inet special files and coprocess semantics unavailable in many POSIX awk implementations.

description.zh: 用 gawk TCP 特殊文件接收命令，并通过协进程读取输出后写回 Socket；每轮关闭子命令管道，连接结束后关闭网络句柄。
description.en: Receive commands through a gawk TCP special file, return coprocess output to the socket, close each child-command pipeline, and close the network handle when the session ends.

description.zh: 向本机 UDP 监听端发送一个固定标记，验证 gawk /inet/udp 支持；UDP 不保证送达，因此不把超时直接判为功能缺失。
description.en: Send one fixed marker to a localhost UDP listener to validate gawk /inet/udp support; because UDP does not guarantee delivery, a timeout alone is not a feature verdict.

patches.value: 接收端先监听并写入新文件，发送端再连接并重定向输入；Netcat 不校验完整性，完成后必须比较文件哈希。
Start the receiver and write to a new file before connecting from the sender; Netcat provides no integrity check, so compare file hashes afterward.
用零 I/O 模式检查授权主机上的有限端口范围，并结合超时、拒绝与成功结果区分过滤状态。
Use zero-I/O mode against a limited authorized port range and distinguish timeout, refusal, and success when interpreting filtering state.
发送最小协议输入并读取服务响应，用于核对协议与版本线索；空输入不适用于所有应用协议。
Send minimal protocol input and read the service response for protocol and version clues, noting that empty input is not valid for every application protocol.
使用 Nmap Ncat 的 TLS 模式建立加密通道；-e 仅在支持该选项的 Ncat 构建中有效，仍需单独验证证书身份。
Use Nmap Ncat TLS mode for an encrypted channel; -e requires a build that supports the option, and peer certificate identity still needs separate validation.
建立单客户端文本通道验证 TCP 可达性；它没有认证、加密、会话管理或多用户聊天能力。
Create a single-client text channel to validate TCP reachability; it provides no authentication, encryption, session management, or multi-user chat features.
man 1 echo
查看第 1 节外部 echo 工具手册；当前 Shell 的同名内建命令可能具有不同选项与转义行为。
Open the section 1 manual for the external echo utility; the current shell's built-in command may expose different options and escape behavior.
man 1 false
查看外部 false 工具的退出状态约定，并与当前 Shell 的同名内建实现区分。
Review the external false utility's exit-status contract and distinguish it from a same-named implementation built into the current shell.
man 1 ls
查看第 1 节 ls 手册，按当前系统实现核对排序、隐藏文件、颜色和时间字段选项。
Open the section 1 ls manual and verify sorting, hidden-file, color, and timestamp options for the implementation installed on the current system.
man 1 make
查看第 1 节 make 手册，核对所安装实现支持的并行构建、变量和目标选择参数。
Open the section 1 make manual and verify parallel-build, variable, and target-selection options supported by the installed implementation.
man 1 printf
查看外部 printf 工具的格式与转义规则；不要假定它与 Bash 内建或语言库函数完全一致。
Review formatting and escape rules for the external printf utility without assuming parity with the Bash built-in or a language library function.
man 1 pwd
查看外部 pwd 工具对逻辑路径与物理路径的处理，并区分符号链接解析后的输出。
Review how the external pwd utility handles logical and physical paths, including output after symbolic-link resolution.
man 1 test
查看外部 test 工具支持的文件、字符串和整数条件，并注意参数缺失会改变表达式解析。
Review file, string, and integer conditions supported by the external test utility, noting that missing arguments can change expression parsing.
man 1 true
查看外部 true 工具的成功退出状态约定，并与当前 Shell 的同名内建实现区分。
Review the external true utility's successful exit-status contract and distinguish it from a same-named implementation built into the current shell.
Get-MpComputerStatus | Select-Object AntivirusEnabled,RealTimeProtectionEnabled,BehaviorMonitorEnabled,AntivirusSignatureLastUpdated
提取 Defender 启用状态、实时与行为监控以及签名更新时间，避免用完整对象中无关字段判断防护状态。
Select Defender enablement, real-time and behavior monitoring, and signature age rather than inferring protection from unrelated fields in the full object.
Get-LocalGroupMember Administrators | Select-Object Name,ObjectClass,PrincipalSource
列出本地 Administrators 组成员及对象类型和主体来源，用于识别本地、域和云身份的实际管理权限。
List local Administrators members with object class and principal source to distinguish local, domain, and cloud identities holding administrative access.
gpresult /scope computer /v
输出计算机范围的详细组策略结果，核对应用与拒绝的 GPO、筛选原因和安全设置来源。
Produce verbose computer-scope Group Policy results, including applied and denied GPOs, filter reasons, and security-setting origins.
Get-ExecutionPolicy -List | Format-Table -AutoSize
按 MachinePolicy、UserPolicy、Process、CurrentUser 和 LocalMachine 展示执行策略，避免只看单一有效值。
Display execution policy by MachinePolicy, UserPolicy, Process, CurrentUser, and LocalMachine instead of checking only one effective value.
Get-ProcessMitigation -System | Format-List
展开系统级进程缓解策略，逐项检查 DEP、ASLR、CFG 和签名限制的启用及覆盖状态。
Expand system process-mitigation policy and review DEP, ASLR, CFG, and signature restrictions with their enablement and override states.
Get-BitLockerVolume | Select-Object MountPoint,VolumeStatus,ProtectionStatus,EncryptionPercentage,EncryptionMethod
按卷输出 BitLocker 加密进度、保护状态和算法，区分已加密但保护器暂停等边界情况。
Report BitLocker encryption progress, protection status, and method per volume, distinguishing encrypted volumes whose protectors are suspended.
Get-Tpm | Select-Object TpmPresent,TpmReady,TpmEnabled,TpmActivated,ManagedAuthLevel
提取 TPM 是否存在、就绪、启用与激活及授权管理级别，不把硬件存在误判为可用。
Select TPM presence, readiness, enablement, activation, and authorization management level without treating hardware presence as operational readiness.
Get-CimInstance Win32_Service | Where-Object { $_.PathName -match '\s' -and $_.PathName -notmatch '^"' } | Select-Object Name,StartName,StartMode,State,PathName
筛选包含空格且未加引号的服务路径，并同时记录启动账户与模式，作为后续人工核对的候选而非直接漏洞结论。
Filter service paths containing spaces without an opening quote and retain account and start-mode context as review candidates rather than automatic vulnerability findings.
wevtutil el | findstr /i "Security PowerShell Sysmon"
枚举事件通道后筛选 Security、PowerShell 与 Sysmon 相关名称，先确认通道存在再执行查询。
Enumerate event channels and filter for Security, PowerShell, and Sysmon names so channel existence is confirmed before querying events.
Get-Help Get-Process -Examples
只读取 Get-Process 的官方示例，快速确认常用参数组合；需要完整参数语义时再使用 -Full。
Read official Get-Process examples for common parameter combinations, switching to -Full only when complete parameter semantics are required.
Get-Command Update-DscConfiguration | Format-List Name,CommandType,Source,Definition
核对 Update-DscConfiguration 在当前会话中的命令类型、来源模块和函数定义，验证其为何进入函数索引。
Inspect Update-DscConfiguration command type, source module, and definition in the current session to verify why it appears in the function index.
